items.title: Word Counter
items.description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and reading time from any text.
items.keywords: word counter, text length, reading time

items.title: Character Counter
items.description: Measure characters with and without spaces for posts, titles, and forms.
items.keywords: character counter, social limits, title length

items.title: Text Cleaner
items.description: Clean copied text by trimming lines, removing control characters, and normalizing spacing.
items.keywords: clean text, remove spaces, normalize text

items.title: Remove Duplicate Lines
items.description: Remove repeated lines and keep a clean unique list.

items.title: JSON Formatter
items.description: Format and validate JSON with readable indentation.

items.title: JSON Minifier
items.description: Minify JSON by removing unnecessary whitespace.

items.title: Base64 Encoder
items.description: Encode plain text into Base64 format in your browser.

items.title: Base64 Decoder
items.description: Decode Base64 strings back into readable text.

items.title: URL Encoder
items.description: Encode URLs and query values safely for web use.

items.title: URL Decoder
items.description: Decode percent-encoded URL text into readable content.

items.title: Password Generator
items.description: Generate secure random passwords with custom length and character sets.

items.title: UUID Generator
items.description: Generate random UUID values directly in the browser.

items.title: AI Prompt Generator
items.description: Build structured prompts for writing, coding, marketing, research, and planning tasks.

items.title: AI Blog Outline Generator
items.description: Create structured blog post outlines from a topic and audience.

items.title: AI Meta Description Generator
items.description: Draft SEO-friendly meta descriptions for web pages and articles.

items.title: SERP Snippet Preview
items.description: Preview how a title, URL, and meta description may appear in Google search results.

items.title: Meta Tag Analyzer
items.description: Analyze page metadata for SEO completeness and clarity.

items.title: Title Tag Checker
items.description: Check title tag length and quality for search visibility.

items.title: Keyword Density Checker
items.description: Estimate keyword frequency in a block of text.

items.title: UTM URL Builder
items.description: Build campaign URLs with source, medium, campaign, term, and content parameters.

items.title: CTR Calculator
items.description: Calculate click-through rate from impressions and clicks.

items.title: Hashtag Generator
items.description: Turn topics and keywords into clean social media hashtags.

items.title: YouTube Channel Name Generator
items.description: Generate YouTube channel name ideas from a topic or niche.

items.title: Age Calculator
items.description: Calculate exact age in years, months, and days from a birth date.

items.title: BMI Calculator
items.description: Calculate body mass index from height and weight with category guidance.

items.title: Percentage Calculator
items.description: Calculate percentages, increases, decreases, and ratios.

items.title: QR Code Generator
items.description: Generate downloadable QR codes as SVG directly in the browser.

items.title: Image Resizer
items.description: Resize uploaded images to custom pixel dimensions using browser canvas.

items.title: Color Palette Generator
items.description: Generate color palettes for design and branding work.

items.title: Pomodoro Timer
items.description: Run a browser-based focus timer with work and break intervals.
